members.title: Members
members.empty: Add team members to collaborate on this project.

members.remove_failed: Failed to remove member. Please try again.

members.already_member: This user is already a member of this project.

members.remove_dialog_body: This will remove {{name}} from the project.

api_keys.title: API Keys
api_keys.no_environments: No environments yet — create an environment before managing API keys.
api_keys.empty: No API keys yet — create one to enable SDK integration
api_keys.tier_destructive_warning: Allows delete operations — use with caution

api_keys.show_once_warning: Copy this key now. It will not be shown again.

api_keys.revoke_failed: Failed to revoke. Please try again.

environments.title: Environments
environments.empty: No environments yet — environments scope flag states, rules, and API keys.
environments.slug_too_long: Slug must be {{max}} characters or fewer
environments.slug_invalid: Slug must start with a letter or digit and contain only lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens
environments.slug_conflict: An environment with this slug already exists in this project
environments.server_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
environments.delete_warning: Deleting this environment will permanently destroy all flag states, targeting rules, and API keys scoped to it. This cannot be undone.
environments.delete_failed: Failed to delete. Please try again.

compare.title: Compare Environments
compare.empty: No flags in this project yet. Create a flag to see the comparison matrix.
